display_name: Northern Plains Tribal Health Region B

sources.population: U.S. Census Bureau. ACS 2020-2024 5-Year Estimates. Northern Plains tribal health region Reservation total population ~7,280.
sources.ethnicity: U.S. Census Bureau ACS 2020-2024. Northern Plains tribal health region Reservation: American Indian/Alaska Native >80% of population.
sources.sex_ratio: U.S. Census Bureau ACS 2020-2024. Female 52.1% on Northern Plains tribal health region Reservation.
sources.diabetes_prevalence: Dai J et al. Diabetes Obes Metab. 2024;27(1):328-337. doi:10.1111/dom.16021. AI/AN diabetes prevalence 13.6% nationally.
sources.hypertension_prevalence: Jolly SE et al. J Clin Hypertens. 2015;17(10):812-818. doi:10.1111/jch.12483. Strong Heart Study ND AI/AN HTN ~27%.
sources.dm_htn_comorbidity: Walls ML et al. J Diabetes Res. 2025. doi:10.1155/jdr/6591307. 77.9% of AI/AN T2D adults also have HTN.
sources.sepsis_social_determinants: Ardabili AK et al. World Med Health Policy. 2025;17(4):823-830. doi:10.1002/wmh3.70043.
sources.afebrile_elderly: Gavazzi G, Krause KH. Lancet Infect Dis. 2002;2(11):659-666. doi:10.1016/S1473-3099(02)00437-1.
sources.ihs_workforce: Brockie T et al. J Clin Nurs. 2021;32(3-4):610-624. doi:10.1111/jocn.15801.

calibration_notes: AI/AN DM prevalence 13.6% nationally vs 8.7% US average. Engine uses US-baseline. Documented gap.
HTN prevalence ~27% in ND AI/AN (Strong Heart Study). Lower than US average but higher DM burden.
77.9% of AI/AN T2D adults also have HTN (Walls 2025).
Northern Plains tribal health region has slightly higher white/mixed population than Northern Plains tribal health region due to historical Northern Plains tribal population community.
IHS access limitations apply — ICU population is those who reached care, not population-representative.

continuous_vars._source: IHS Trends in Indian Health 2014-2015; NHANES AI/AN oversampling; Strong Heart Study ND data.

hba1c.source: IHS data; AI/AN DM prevalence 13.6% (Dai 2024); slightly lower mean than Northern Plains tribal health region due to Northern Plains tribal population admixture

bmi.source: BRFSS AI/AN oversampling; Strong Heart Study. High obesity burden in AI/AN populations.

systolic_bp.source: Strong Heart Study ND AI/AN; Jolly 2015 WATCH Study; estimated 27-40% HTN AI/AN

creatinine.source: NHANES AI/AN CKD data; higher CKD burden from DM+HTN comorbidity; Nephrology 2021

egfr.source: IHS CKD surveillance; CKD-EPI 2021; elevated CKD stage 3+ in AI/AN DM+HTN population

temporal_trends._source: IHS trend data; CDC AI/AN surveillance; CMS Part D AI/AN utilization; BRFSS AI/AN oversampling

disease_prevalence_shift._unit: absolute prevalence change (fraction) at 6-month drift interval

prescription_shift._unit: relative change fraction at 6-month drift interval

6.source: IHS trends 2024; CDC AI/AN Diabetes Surveillance; BRFSS AI/AN 2022

disease_prevalence_shift._unit: absolute prevalence change (fraction) at 12-month drift interval

prescription_shift._unit: relative change fraction at 12-month drift interval

12.source: IHS trends 2024; CDC AI/AN Diabetes Surveillance; BRFSS AI/AN 2022

disease_prevalence_shift._unit: absolute prevalence change (fraction) at 18-month drift interval

prescription_shift._unit: relative change fraction at 18-month drift interval

18.source: IHS trends 2024; CDC AI/AN Diabetes Surveillance; BRFSS AI/AN 2022
